sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), age INT CHECK (age >= 0), description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age, description) VALUES (1, 'John', 30, 'First entry'), (2, 'Jane', 25, 'Second entry'), (3, 'Doe', NULL, 'Third entry');
SELECT id, name || space(5) || description AS full_description FROM test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL && description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(name) AS name_count FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING name_count > 1;
SELECT id, SUM(age) AS total_age FROM test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL || space(0) GROUP BY id WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY total_age DESC);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE (age IS NULL && description = space(0)) || (name LIKE 'J%');
SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE age > 20) AS older_count FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL && (description LIKE '%' || space(3) || '%') ORDER BY id;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, name, space(10) AS padded_name FROM test_table WHERE age < 50;
INSERT INTO temp_table (id, padded_name) SELECT id, name || space(10) FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL;
SELECT id, space(COALESCE(age, 0)) AS space_age FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL) && (description IS NOT NULL);
